name: Sheltered Housing
description: Housing with support for older or disabled people.
notes: GLA treats this as a separate field rather than a housing type.

name: Bedsit/Studio
notes: Used by both MHCLG and GLA.

name: Cluster Flats
notes: Used by both MHCLG and GLA.

name: Other
description: Any other housing type not listed.
notes: Used by both MHCLG and GLA.

name: Live-Work Units
notes: Used by both MHCLG and GLA.

name: Unknown
description: When the type of housing is uncertain.

name: Co Living Unit
notes: Used by GLA only with no clear MHCLG parent.

name: HMO
notes: Used by GLA only with no clear MHCLG parent.

name: Student Accommodation
notes: Used by GLA only with no clear MHCLG parent.

name: Communal Space
description: Communal space associated with residential use.
notes: Used by GLA only with no clear MHCLG parent.
